Sense.Definition: speakers/writers, or the speaker/writer and at least one other person
But, although, nevertheless, even if. Place after a space after the word
The one or ones mentioned; which, that
you, second person pronoun (informal, impolite) Used while talking to person of lower age or of same age, with equal social status. Not used against elder people
a polite thank-you said at the end of a speech
(with noun classes) because of, due to. (Placed after word)
Him, that person, to respectfully address a person, respectful pronoun for third person
"by" in day by day, city by city
showing disagreement with the statement; disagreeing that the claim is plausible
without; free of; got rid of
he (lacks respect; not used for elders)
postposition meaning from, for number ranger, time interval etc.
good morning, salutation used in the morning
is it?; an interjection showing agreement with a claim
(archaic) Very large number, infinitly large number

Synset.Definition: speakers/writers, or the speaker/writer and at least one other person
But, although, nevertheless, even if. Place after a space after the word
The one or ones mentioned; which, that
you, second person pronoun (informal, impolite) Used while talking to person of lower age or of same age, with equal social status. Not used against elder people
a polite thank-you said at the end of a speech
(with noun classes) because of, due to. (Placed after word)
Him, that person, to respectfully address a person, respectful pronoun for third person
"by" in day by day, city by city
showing disagreement with the statement; disagreeing that the claim is plausible
without; free of; got rid of
he (lacks respect; not used for elders)
postposition meaning from, for number ranger, time interval etc.
good morning, salutation used in the morning
is it?; an interjection showing agreement with a claim
(archaic) Very large number, infinitly large number
